pages.text: The $(l)Pool Attunement Charm$() is a curio that binds a single Botania Mana Pool as a supplementary mana source for $(l)Nature-school$() spells.$(br2)Worn in the Charm slot, the charm allows nature spells to draw Botania mana from your bound pool when carried mana sources are exhausted.

$(l)Binding:$()$(br)$(li)Defeat the Gaia Guardian to unlock Spell Overcharge$(br)$(li)Right-click the charm on a Mana Pool to bind$(br)$(li)Binding overwrites previous binding$(br2)$(l)Limits:$()$(br)$(li)Same dimension only$(br)$(li)Range cap: 64 blocks (configurable)$(br)$(li)Bandwidth: 50,000 mana per cast (configurable)$(br)$(li)Nature-school spells only — does not power generic ISS spells.
